io.bloviate.testcontainers.BloviateContainers.Builder

Package
Description
io.bloviate.testcontainers
 

  • Uses of BloviateContainers.Builder in io.bloviate.testcontainers

    Methods in io.bloviate.testcontainers that return BloviateContainers.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    BloviateContainers.Builder.batchSize(int batchSize)
    Sets the JDBC batch size for INSERTs.
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    BloviateContainers.Builder.databaseSupport(DatabaseSupport databaseSupport)
    Overrides the auto-detected DatabaseSupport.
    static BloviateContainers.Builder
    BloviateContainers.forContainer(org.testcontainers.containers.JdbcDatabaseContainer<?> container)
    Begins configuring a fill for the given started container.
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    BloviateContainers.Builder.rows(long rows)
    Sets the default number of rows to generate per table.
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    BloviateContainers.Builder.seed(long seed)
    Sets the base seed for reproducible generation.
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    BloviateContainers.Builder.tableConfigurations(Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations)
    Sets optional per-table overrides.
